2603.20799.title: RLVR Training of LLMs Does Not Improve Thinking Ability for General QA: Evaluation Method and a Simple Solution
2603.20799.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) stimulates the thinking processes of large language models (LLMs), substantially enhancing their reasoning abilities on verifiable tasks. It is often assumed that similar gains should transfer to general question answering (GQA), but this assumption has not been thoroughly validated. To assess whether RLVR automatically improves LLM performance on GQA, we propose a Cross-Generation evaluation framework that measures the quality of intermediate reasoning by feeding the generated thinking context into LLMs of varying capabilities. Our evaluation leads to a discouraging finding: the efficacy of the thinking process on GQA tasks is markedly lower than on verifiable tasks, suggesting that explicit training on GQA remains necessary in addition to training on verifiable tasks. We further observe that direct RL training on GQA is less effective than RLVR. Our hypothesis is that, whereas verifiable tasks demand robust logical chains to obtain high rewards, GQA tasks often admit shortcuts to high rewards without cultivating high-quality thinking. To avoid possible shortcuts, we introduce a simple method, Separated Thinking And Response Training (START), which first trains only the thinking process, using rewards defined on the final answer. We show that START improves both the quality of thinking and the final answer across several GQA benchmarks and RL algorithms.
2603.20799.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習從可驗證獎勵中獲得（RLVR）刺激了大型語言模型（LLMs）的思考過程，顯著提升了它們在可驗證任務上的推理能力。人們通常假設類似的增益應該會轉移到一般問題回答（GQA）上，但這一假設尚未得到徹底驗證。為了評估RLVR是否自動改善LLM在GQA上的表現，我們提出了一個跨世代評估框架，通過將生成的思考上下文輸入不同能力的LLMs來衡量中間推理的質量。我們的評估結果令人沮喪：在GQA任務上的思考過程的有效性明顯低於可驗證任務，這表明除了在可驗證任務上進行訓練外，對GQA的明確訓練仍然是必要的。我們進一步觀察到，對GQA的直接RL訓練不如RLVR有效。我們的假設是，儘管可驗證任務需要穩健的邏輯鏈來獲得高獎勵，但GQA任務往往允許通過捷徑獲得高獎勵，而不培養高質量的思考。為了避免可能的捷徑，我們引入了一種簡單的方法，稱為分開思考與回應訓練（START），該方法首先僅訓練思考過程，使用基於最終答案定義的獎勵。我們顯示，START在多個GQA基準和RL算法中改善了思考的質量和最終答案。
2603.20799.author: Kaiyuan Li et.al.
2603.20799.authors: Kaiyuan Li, Jing-Cheng Pang, Yang Yu
